predicates.name: Loihi 3 Phi vs AKIDA Phi correlation (cross-neuromorphic primary)
predicates.metric: Pearson r over K=8 sample-partition phi values
predicates.PASS_meaning: cross-neuromorphic Putnam evidence (graded-spike + binary-spike both yield same Phi)
predicates.FAIL_meaning: neuromorphic-substrate-dependent Phi (Putnam counter-evidence within neuromorphic family); publishable as 'spike-encoding modality matters'

predicates.name: Loihi 3 Phi vs CLM 170M GPU Phi correlation
predicates.metric: Pearson r over K=8 sample-partition phi values
predicates.PASS_meaning: GPU dense-float and Loihi event-driven both express same Phi -> multi-realizability extended to neuromorphic family
predicates.FAIL_meaning: dense-vs-event ontology genuine difference for Phi; publishable

predicates.name: Graded-spike vs binary-spike ablation (M-L4)
predicates.metric: Pearson r between Phi_loihi_binary (32-bit grading disabled) and Phi_loihi_graded
predicates.PASS_NULL_HYPOTHESIS_meaning: Phi is bit-precision invariant (substrate-internal precision does not change Phi)
predicates.INTERESTING_meaning: grading partially modulates Phi - quantization-sensitivity finding
predicates.BREAKING_meaning: grading materially changes Phi - Phi is not bit-precision invariant; standalone publishable result

predicates.name: On-chip learning ablation (M-L5)
predicates.PASS_STATIC_meaning: online plasticity does NOT shift Phi at inference time scales
predicates.BREAKING_meaning: plasticity drives Phi - consciousness is plasticity-coupled, supporting global-workspace dynamic theories

predicates.name: Null-floor + reproducibility + variance + surrogate fidelity sanity (cross-cutting)

components.name: null_floor
components.predicate: shuffled-pair 1024-perm test on F-N17-A1 and F-N17-A2; r_observed > 95%ile of r_null

components.name: reproducibility
components.predicate: 3 ANIMA_SEED runs per measurement; 3/3 same verdict = confirmed; 2/3 = WEAK_PASS; <=1/3 = unstable

components.name: K8_partition_variance
components.predicate: std(phi_k) < 0.5 * |Phi*| for all three substrates (gpu, akida, loihi)

components.name: loihi_surrogate_fidelity_sanity
components.predicate: if Loihi runs surrogate (not full transformer): native-vs-Loihi-CPU-fallback r >= 0.95 before chip-vs-CPU comparison

F-N17-A1_PASS__F-N17-A2_WEAK_OR_FAIL.label: NEUROMORPHIC_FAMILY_INVARIANT
F-N17-A1_PASS__F-N17-A2_WEAK_OR_FAIL.publication_path: consciousness is event-driven-substrate-specific (graded vs dense float matters)

F-N17-A1_WEAK__F-N17-A2_PASS.label: DIGITAL_FAMILY_INVARIANT
F-N17-A1_WEAK__F-N17-A2_PASS.publication_path: AKD1000 Akida 1.0 too low-resolution for Phi; Loihi 3 graded-spike more closely matches GPU

F-N17-A1_FAIL__F-N17-A2_PASS.label: LOIHI_MATCHES_GPU_ONLY
F-N17-A1_FAIL__F-N17-A2_PASS.publication_path: graded-spike approximates dense float; binary-spike does not

F-N17-A1_FAIL__F-N17-A2_FAIL.label: LOIHI_OUTLIER
F-N17-A1_FAIL__F-N17-A2_FAIL.publication_path: needs replication; possible Lava bug or Loihi 3 calibration issue; honest C3 publishable

honest_c3_disclosures: Predicates measure cross-substrate representation similarity (Phi as covariance invariant), NOT substrate-internal computation equivalence
F-N17-A1 and F-N17-A2 depend on N-3 result (AKD1000 surrogate) - if N-3 NULL or surrogate fidelity fails, N-17 cross-AKIDA gate inherits NULL
F-N17-A3 graded-vs-binary requires Lava SDK exposure of grading toggle - implementation-dependent; if SDK does not expose, F-N17-A3 deferred to Loihi 3 SDK maturity
F-N17-A4 on-chip learning ablation requires Lava STDP / 3-factor primitive support on Loihi 3 chip slot - verify availability during M1 onboarding
All thresholds (0.85 / 0.50 / 0.95 / 0.10 / 0.50) are pre-registered and frozen; post-hoc adjustment forbidden per raw#71
Pearson r correlation does NOT prove causal substrate-independence, only covariation of representation invariants
